data.title: CPKC announces filing of proxy circular
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta, on March 25, 2026, Canadian Pacific Kansas City (CPKC) released news that it has submitted its notice of meeting and management proxy circular for its 2026 annual shareholder meeting to regulators in Canada and the United States. The company is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX: CP) and the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: CP).

data.title: Worthington Steel Reports Third Quarter Fiscal 2026 Results
data.description: In Columbus, Ohio, Worthington Steel, Inc. (NYSE: WS) released its fiscal 2026 third quarter financial report as of February 28, 2026.

data.title: EnerSys Announces Strategic Manufacturing Restructuring: Tijuana, Mexico Facility Closure and Optimization of U.S. Manufacturing Footprint
data.description: EnerSys (NYSE: ENS), a prominent player in industrial energy storage solutions, has unveiled plans for a strategic manufacturing shift aimed at boosting operational effectiveness. The company will be shutting down its longstanding lead-acid battery manufacturing site in Tijuana, Mexico, as part of this reorganization. Instead, the focus will shift towards its cutting-edge Thin Plate Pure Lead (TPPL) plant in Springfield, Missouri. By making this transition, EnerSys intends to capitalize on its previous investments and streamline the production process.

data.title: FIRST STUDENT TEAMSTERS AUTHORIZE STRIKE
data.description: More than 17,000 bus workers in various locations around the country are prepared to go on strike in demand of a fair agreement. The Teamsters school bus employees at First Student sites nationwide have voted with an overwhelming 88 percent majority to approve a strike if negotiations do not result in a satisfactory resolution.

data.title: Marchex Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results and Archenia Transaction Update
data.description: Seattle-based Marchex Inc. (NASDAQ: MCHX) revealed its financial outcomes for Q4 and full year ending December 31, 2025. In Q4 2025, the company recorded a GAAP revenue of $10.8 million, decreased from $11.9 million in Q4 2024. Throughout the year 2025, the GAAP revenue amounted to $45.4 million. Marchex's focus on AI and conversation intelligence drives insights from vertical market data analytics.

data.title: $15B worth of Bitcoin options to expire on Friday, coinciding with Trump's Iran deadline. Will volatility surge?
data.description: On Friday, Bitcoin options valued at $15 billion are set to expire, coinciding with the expiration of a diplomatic deadline between Trump and Iran. Traders are anticipating increased volatility in the market due to these simultaneous events.
